TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Kunuan, title = Kunuan, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Kunuan} }

S.FORM: Kunuan Itiniay i Wanrong Cen no Hualien ko Kunuan a niyaro', 141 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 521 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 98% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 512 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 2% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 9 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Bunun 89%, Amis 2%, Tayal 1%, Truku 1%, roma 5%. Ira ko picodadan i niyaro'. Ira ko paisingan i niyaro'.
S.PHON: ko~u~uno~u~uan itiniaj i wanro~uŋ ʦən no~u ħo~u~uaɾiən ko~u ko~u~uno~u~uan a nijaro~uʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin , po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, *% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, * ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i, ko~u b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un **%, amis *%, tajaɾ *%, tro~u~uko~u~u *%, ro~uma *%. ira ko~u piʦo~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮan i nijaro~uʡ. ira ko~u paisiŋan i nijaro~uʡ.
S.FORM: Kunuan Itiniay i Wanrong Cen no Hualien ko Kunuan a niyaro', 141 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 521 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 98% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 512 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 2% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 9 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Bunun 89%, Amis 2%, Tayal 1%, Truku 1%, roma 5%. Ira ko picodadan i niyaro'. Ira ko paisingan i niyaro'.
S.PHON: ko~u~uno~u~uan itiniaj i wanro~uŋ ʦən no~u ħo~u~uaɾiən ko~u ko~u~uno~u~uan a nijaro~uʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin , po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, *% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, * ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i, ko~u b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un **%, amis *%, tajaɾ *%, tro~u~uko~u~u *%, ro~uma *%. ira ko~u piʦo~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮan i nijaro~uʡ. ira ko~u paisiŋan i nijaro~uʡ.
